name: cella
description: Cella is a TypeScript template to build collaborative web apps with sync engine. MIT licensed.
author: CellaJS <info@cellajs.com>

scripts.docker:test: docker compose -f backend/compose.yaml --profile test up -d --wait db_test
scripts.sdk: pnpm --filter backend generate:openapi && pnpm --filter sdk generate:sdk
scripts.dev: pnpm run clean && cross-env pnpm --reporter=append-only -r --parallel --stream dev
scripts.dev:single: pnpm run clean && cross-env SINGLE_VM=true pnpm --reporter=append-only -r --parallel --stream --filter backend --filter frontend dev
scripts.dev:migration: pnpm run clean && cross-env DATABASE_URL=postgres://postgres:postgres@0.0.0.0:5555/postgres DATABASE_ADMIN_URL=postgres://postgres:postgres@0.0.0.0:5555/postgres pnpm --reporter=append-only -r --parallel --stream dev
scripts.tunnel: pnpm run clean && cross-env pnpm --reporter=append-only -r --parallel --stream tunnel
scripts.dev:proxy: pnpm run clean && cross-env pnpm --reporter=append-only -r --parallel --stream --filter backend --filter cdc-worker --filter frontend --filter proxy dev
scripts.check: pnpm sdk && pnpm --filter backend ts && pnpm -r --filter '!backend' ts && pnpm --filter shared lens:check && pnpm lint:fix
scripts.lint: pnpm biome check . && pnpm docs:style && pnpm comments:check && pnpm comments:placement
scripts.lint:fix: pnpm biome check --write --unsafe && pnpm docs:style && pnpm comments:check && pnpm comments:placement
scripts.tsperf: pnpm --filter backend tsperf && pnpm --filter frontend tsperf && pnpm --filter cdc-worker tsperf && pnpm --filter yjs-worker tsperf
scripts.test:core: pnpm docker:test && cross-env TEST_MODE=core vitest run --silent=passed-only
scripts.test:core:verbose: pnpm docker:test && cross-env TEST_MODE=core vitest run
scripts.test:full: pnpm docker:test && cross-env TEST_MODE=full COVERAGE_REPORTERS=summary vitest run --coverage.enabled --silent=passed-only
scripts.test:full:verbose: pnpm docker:test && cross-env TEST_MODE=full vitest run
scripts.offline: cross-env pnpm -r --parallel --stream --filter backend --filter cdc-worker dev & pnpm --filter frontend offline
